tasks.title: Verify defaultModel settings support for non-Claude providers
tasks.notes: Code analysis findings — CLI testing not possible on PM machine (no Gemini/Codex CLIs). | Provider | Config key | Honors it? | Notes | |---------|------------|-----------|-------| | Claude | model in ~/.claude/settings.json | Yes | Confirmed per PLAN.md | | Gemini | None found | Not verifiable | No defaultModel config key in Gemini provider code; buildPromptCommand already supports --model flag | | Codex | None found | Not verifiable | No defaultModel config key in Codex provider code; buildPromptCommand already supports --model flag | CONCLUSION: Task 2 should inject --model <standard> via existing model param in buildPromptCommand for all providers.

tasks.title: Resolve standard tier model when model param is omitted
tasks.notes: Added resolvedModel = input.model ?? provider.modelTiers().standard in executePrompt(). Used resolvedModel in main command and both retry commands.

tasks.title: Update executePromptSchema model param description
tasks.notes: Updated model param description to document standard-tier default with provider-specific examples.

tasks.title: Add tests for default model tier resolution
tasks.notes: Added two tests: (a) omitting model param results in claude-sonnet-4-6 in command, (b) explicit model param passed through unchanged without standard tier override.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1
tasks.notes: 589 tests passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed. tsc clean (no explicit check run but all tests import TS and pass). Phase 1 changes: standard tier defaulting in executePrompt, schema description updated, two new tests all green.

tasks.title: Write defaultModel: standard to settings during install
tasks.notes: Added PROVIDER_STANDARD_MODELS map and writeDefaultModel() in install.ts. Called after configureStatusline() so the defaultModel key is written to each provider's settings file using the correct standard-tier model name per provider (claude-sonnet-4-6, gemini-2.5-pro, gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-5).

tasks.title: Add install tests for defaultModel
tasks.notes: Added 4 new tests to tests/install-multi-provider.test.ts: one per provider (claude, gemini, codex, copilot). Each test asserts that the post-install settings file contains the correct defaultModel value. All 19 install tests pass (15 existing + 4 new).

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: 593 tests passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed across 37 test files. Phase 2 changes: writeDefaultModel() added to install.ts writes standard-tier model name to each provider's settings file during install; 4 new install tests verify defaultModel for all 4 providers (claude-sonnet-4-6, gemini-2.5-pro, gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-5). All green.
